scored_papers.title: Staggered fermions with taste splitting mass term on dynamical configurations
scored_papers.abstract: We present numerical results of staggered fermions with a taste splitting mass term on dynamical configurations. The rise of gluonic counterterms from rotational symmetry breaking is studied for a single taste operator and the pion propagator is computed. Preliminary numerical results are given for lattice sizes up to 16^4.
scored_papers.reason: taste splitting質量項を持つスタッガードfermionの動的配位上での数値結果🎯⚡️まさにご専門分野に直結する研究です🔬
scored_papers.summary: 回転対称性の破れから生じるグルーオン対抗項を単一taste演算子で評価し、16^4格子でpion propagatorを計算した予備的結果📊🧮
